attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT /*+ PARALLEL(4) */ DISTINCT 
       p.person_id
     , p.first_name
     , p.middle_names
     , p.last_name
     , p.previous_last_name
     , p.full_name
     , p.pre_name_adjunct
     , p.suffix
     , p.title
     , p.date_of_birth
     , p.country_of_birth
     , p.sex
     , p.email_address
     , NVL (svc.date_start, p.start_date) emp_hire_dt
     , p.original_date_of_hire orig_hire_dt
     , svc.adjusted_svc_date adj_service_dt
     , svc.accepted_termination_date accepted_termination_dt
     , svc.actual_termination_date actual_termination_dt
     , lrlkp.meaning leaving_reason
     , p.employee_number
     , p.applicant_number
     , p.npw_number
     , p.marital_status
     , p.national_identifier
     , CASE p.per_information_category
          WHEN 'CN'
             THEN p.per_information17
          WHEN 'GB'
             THEN p.per_information1
          WHEN 'IE'
             THEN p.per_information2
          WHEN 'NZ'
             THEN p.per_information4
          WHEN 'SG'
             THEN p.per_information18
          WHEN 'ZA'
             THEN p.per_information5
          ELSE NULL
       END ethnic_grp_code
     , CASE p.per_information_category
          WHEN 'US'
             THEN p.per_information4
          WHEN 'SG'
             THEN p.per_information8
          ELSE NULL
       END wrk_perm_type_code
     , p.correspondence_language
     , CASE p.per_information_category
          WHEN 'US'
             THEN p.per_information25
          ELSE NULL
       END veteran_status_code
     , p.registered_disabled_flag
     , CASE p.per_information_category
          WHEN 'AE'
             THEN p.per_information10
          WHEN 'KW'
             THEN p.per_information8
          WHEN 'SA'
             THEN p.per_information7
          WHEN 'ZG'
             THEN p.per_information16
          WHEN 'ZA'
             THEN p.per_information7
          ELSE NULL
       END w_religion_code
     , (CASE
           WHEN (p.current_employee_flag = 'Y' OR p.current_npw_flag = 'Y')
              THEN 'Y'
           ELSE 'N'
        END
       ) current_worker_flg
     , (CASE
           WHEN sr.person_id IS NULL
              THEN 'N'
           ELSE 'Y'
        END) sales_rep_flg
     , (CASE
           WHEN buy.agent_id IS NULL
              THEN 'N'
           ELSE 'Y'
        END) buyer_flg
     , (CASE
           WHEN p.current_employee_flag IS NULL
              THEN 'N'
           ELSE 'Y'
        END) requestor_flg
     , (CASE
           WHEN p.current_applicant_flag IS NULL
              THEN 'N'
           ELSE 'Y'
        END) applicant_flg
     , p.created_by
     , p.last_updated_by
     , p.creation_date
     , p.last_update_date
     , sr.aux1_changed_on_dt
     , buy.last_update_date aux2_changed_on_dt
     , p.effective_start_date
     , p.effective_end_date
     , l.meaning nationality
     , a.position_id position_id
     , a.business_group_id
     , a.location_id
     , a.organization_id
     , a.supervisor_id
     , a.manager_flag  -- Newly Included
     , '0' AS x_custom
     , lc.meaning employee_category
     , lc.meaning transaction_code
     , p.attribute_category
     , p.attribute1
     , p.attribute2
     , p.attribute3
     , p.attribute4
     , p.attribute5
     , p.attribute6
     , p.attribute7
     , p.attribute8
     , (SELECT ppf9.full_name
          FROM per_all_people_f ppf9
         WHERE ppf9.person_id = p.attribute9
           AND TRUNC (SYSDATE) BETWEEN ppf9.effective_start_date
                                   AND ppf9.effective_end_date) attribute9
     , p.attribute10
     , nvl(pav.name, a.vacancy_id)  as attribute11
     , p.attribute12
     , p.attribute13
     , p.attribute14
     , DECODE (p.attribute_category
             , 'CL Additional Personal Details', DECODE (p.attribute15
                                                       , 'Y', 'Yes'
                                                       , 'N', 'No'
                                                        )
             , 'IN Additional Personal Details', (SELECT meaning
                                                    FROM fnd_lookup_values
                                                   WHERE lookup_code =
                                                                 p.attribute15
                                                     AND enabled_flag = 'Y'
                                                     AND lookup_type =
                                                                 'IN_RELIGION'
                                                     AND LANGUAGE =
                                                              USERENV ('lang'))
             , 'PE Additional Personal Details', DECODE (p.attribute15
                                                       , 'Y', 'Yes'
                                                       , 'N', 'No'
                                                        )
             , 'SG Additional Personal Details', (SELECT meaning
                                                    FROM fnd_lookup_values
                                                   WHERE lookup_code =
                                                                 p.attribute15
                                                     AND enabled_flag = 'Y'
                                                     AND lookup_type =
                                                                     'SG_RACE'
                                                     AND LANGUAGE =
                                                              USERENV ('lang'))
             , 'US Employee', DECODE (p.attribute15, 'Y', 'Yes', 'N', 'No')
             , 'US Expatriate Employee', DECODE (p.attribute15
                                               , 'Y', 'Yes'
                                               , 'N', 'No'
                                                )
             , p.attribute15
              ) attribute15
     , DECODE (p.attribute_category
             , 'FR Additional Personal Details', DECODE (p.attribute16
                                                       , 'Y', 'Yes'
                                                       , 'N', 'No'
                                                        )
             , 'IT Additional Personal Details', (SELECT meaning
                                                    FROM fnd_lookup_values
                                                   WHERE lookup_code =
                                                                 p.attribute16
                                                     AND enabled_flag = 'Y'
                                                     AND lookup_type =
                                                                 'IT_PROVINCE'
                                                     AND LANGUAGE =
                                                              USERENV ('lang'))
             , 'PE Additional Personal Details', (SELECT meaning
                                                    FROM fnd_lookup_values
                                                   WHERE lookup_code =
                                                                 p.attribute16
                                                     AND enabled_flag = 'Y'
                                                     AND lookup_type =
                                                            'JEG_HR_PE_NI_TYPE'
                                                     AND LANGUAGE =
                                                              USERENV ('lang'))
             , 'SG Additional Personal Details', (SELECT meaning
                                                    FROM fnd_lookup_values
                                                   WHERE lookup_code =
                                                                 p.attribute16
                                                     AND enabled_flag = 'Y'
                                                     AND lookup_type =
                                                            'JEG_SG_CITIZEN_STATUS'
                                                     AND LANGUAGE =
                                                              USERENV ('lang'))
             , 'US Employee', DECODE (p.attribute16, 'Y', 'Yes', 'N', 'No')
             , 'US Expatriate Employee', DECODE (p.attribute16
                                               , 'Y', 'Yes'
                                               , 'N', 'No'
                                                )
             , p.attribute16
              ) attribute16
     , DECODE (p.attribute_category
             , 'ES Additional Personal Details', (SELECT meaning
                                                    FROM fnd_lookup_values
                                                   WHERE lookup_code =
                                                                 p.attribute17
                                                     AND enabled_flag = 'Y'
                                                     AND lookup_type =
                                                              'JEG_HR_ES_CNAE'
                                                     AND LANGUAGE =
                                                              USERENV ('lang'))
             , p.attribute17
              ) attribute17
     , DECODE (p.attribute_category
             , 'BE Additional Personal Details', (SELECT meaning
                                                    FROM fnd_lookup_values
                                                   WHERE lookup_code =
                                                                 p.attribute18
                                                     AND enabled_flag = 'Y'
                                                     AND lookup_type =
                                                             'JEG_BE_CORRESPONDENCE_LANGUAGE'
                                                     AND LANGUAGE =
                                                              USERENV ('lang'))
             , 'FR Additional Personal Details', DECODE (p.attribute18
                                                       , 'Y', 'Yes'
                                                       , 'N', 'No'
                                                        )
             , 'GB Additional Person Details', (SELECT meaning
                                                  FROM fnd_lookup_values
                                                 WHERE lookup_code =
                                                                 p.attribute18
                                                   AND enabled_flag = 'Y'
                                                   AND lookup_type =
                                                           'JEG_HR_GB_ACQUISITION_COMPANY'
                                                   AND LANGUAGE =
                                                              USERENV ('lang'))
             , 'IE Additional Person Details', (SELECT meaning
                                                  FROM fnd_lookup_values
                                                 WHERE lookup_code =
                                                                 p.attribute18
                                                   AND enabled_flag = 'Y'
                                                   AND lookup_type =
                                                           'JEG_HR_IE_ACQUISITION_COMPANY'
                                                   AND LANGUAGE =
                                                              USERENV ('lang'))
             , p.attribute18
              ) attribute18
     , DECODE (p.attribute_category
             , 'GB Additional Personal Details', DECODE (p.attribute19
                                                       , 'Y', 'Yes'
                                                       , 'N', 'No'
                                                        )
             , 'IE Additional Person Details', DECODE (p.attribute19
                                                     , 'Y', 'Yes'
                                                     , 'N', 'No'
                                                      )
             , p.attribute19
              ) attribute19
     , DECODE (p.attribute_category
             , 'US Employee', DECODE (p.attribute20, 'Y', 'Yes', 'N', 'No')
             , 'US Expatriate Employee', DECODE (p.attribute20
                                               , 'Y', 'Yes'
                                               , 'N', 'No'
                                                )
             , p.attribute20
              ) attribute20
     , DECODE (p.attribute_category
             , 'CZ Additional Personal Details', DECODE (p.attribute21
                                                       , 'Y', 'Yes'
                                                       , 'N', 'No'
                                                        )
             , 'GB Additional Person Details', DECODE (p.attribute21
                                                     , 'Y', 'Yes'
                                                     , 'N', 'No'
                                                      )
             , p.attribute21
              ) attribute21
     , p.attribute22
     , p.attribute23
     , p.attribute24
     , p.attribute25
     , p.attribute26
     , p.attribute27
     , p.attribute28
     , p.attribute29
     , p.attribute30
,p.KNOWN_AS
,p.MAILSTOP
,p.ON_MILITARY_SERVICE
,p.SECOND_PASSPORT_EXISTS
,p.DPDNT_VLNTRY_SVCE_FLAG   
,p.TOWN_OF_BIRTH --Column Order Changed
,p.REGION_OF_BIRTH --Column Order Changed
,p.per_information2
,p.per_information7
,p.per_information8
,p.per_information9
,p.DATE_OF_DEATH
,pa.secondary_approver
,pt.Phone_number  -- changed pp to pt by rar
,((sysdate- p.date_of_birth)/365) Age --  Age Rounded Issue
,pa.primary_approver
,p.BENEFIT_GROUP_ID
,p.USES_TOBACCO_FLAG
,p.COORD_BEN_NO_CVG_FLAG
,p.RECEIPT_OF_DEATH_CERT_DATE
,p.COORD_BEN_MED_PLN_NO
,p.WORK_SCHEDULE
,p.FTE_CAPACITY
,p.DATE_EMPLOYEE_DATA_VERIFIED
,p.STUDENT_STATUS
,p.DPDNT_ADOPTION_DATE
,pt.meaning PHONE_TYPE --Added newly - changed it top meaning from lookup_code
,PPG.SEGMENT6 REG_TEMP_OTHER
,CASE p.per_information_category
          WHEN 'NL'
                     THEN p.per_information1
          ELSE NULL
    END AS X_INITIALS  
,CASE p.per_information_category
    WHEN 'US'
    THEN p.per_information25
    ELSE NULL
  END AS VETS100A_CODE,
   CASE WHEN p.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = 0 
THEN
p.PER_INFORMATION29
ELSE
p.REGISTERED_DISABLED_FLAG END as DISABILITY_CODE
,DECODE (p.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID , 0,
  (SELECT distinct meaning
FROM fnd_lookup_values 
WHERE  
 lookup_code  = p.PER_INFORMATION29
AND lookup_type =  'US_OFCCP_DIASABILITY' 
AND language = 'US') , 
  (SELECT distinct meaning
FROM   fnd_lookup_values 
WHERE  
lookup_code  = p.REGISTERED_DISABLED_FLAG
AND lookup_type =  'REGISTERED_DISABLED' 
AND language = 'US')) DISABILITY_NAME
,upn.PEI_information4 ACTIVE_DIRECTORY_UPN
,TALEO.PEI_INFORMATION3 X_TALEO_CAND_ID
,'' AS EXT_SUP_EMP_NUM
,'' AS EXT_SUP_EMP_NAME
,'' AS EXT_SUP_TERM_DT
,'' AS EXT_SUP_EMAIL
,'' AS EXT_SUP_SOURCE_SYSTEM
,a.ASS_ATTRIBUTE2 DEPARTMENT_CODE
, CASE p.per_information_category
          WHEN 'IN'
             THEN p.per_information4
       END AS X_IN_PAN_NUM
,ppt.SYSTEM_PERSON_TYPE
,p.OFFICE_NUMBER
,TS.Technologist_Solution_Area
,TS.TS_Currently_in_Program
,TS.TS_enabled_flag
,TS.TS_START_DATE
,TS.TS_END_DATE
,CASE p.per_information_category WHEN 'IN' THEN p.PER_INFORMATION16 ELSE NULL END AS x_aadhaar_num
,(select meaning
               from apps.fnd_lookup_values a
               where lookup_type = 'JEG_HR_DETAILED_LEAV_REAS'
               and LANGUAGE = 'US'
               and a.lookup_code = svc.pds_information16
              ) as Detailed_leaving_reason  
,svc.NOTIFIED_TERMINATION_DATE ,
p.party_id,
(SELECT description
		FROM apps.fnd_lookup_values flv
		WHERE lookup_type = 'JEG_HR_ELT_SLT_FLAG'
		AND   language = 'US'
		AND   p.ATTRIBUTE11 = flv.lookup_code) ELT_SLT_FLAG --Added newly as part of SCTASK0886709
, EN.CONSULTATION_DATE
,EN.NEXT_CONSULTATION_DATE
,EN.EYE_CARE		
,TE.Tropical_Work_Eligibility
,TE.Tropical_Eligible_Country

  FROM 
  (select ppf.person_id
      ,max(decode(fif.application_column_name,'SEGMENT1',apr1.full_name,''))  Primary_Approver
      ,max(decode(fif.application_column_name,'SEGMENT2',apr2.full_name,''))  Secondary_Approver
        from 
            apps.per_people_x ppf
    ,apps.per_people_x apr1
    ,apps.per_people_x apr2
    ,apps.per_person_analyses ppa
    ,apps.per_analysis_criteria pac
    ,apps.fnd_id_flex_segments fif
    ,apps.fnd_id_flex_structures ffs
where 1=1
  and ppf.person_id = ppa.person_id
  and ppa.analysis_criteria_id = pac.analysis_criteria_id
  and pac.id_flex_num = fif.id_flex_num
  and pac.id_flex_num = ffs.id_flex_num
  and ffs.id_flex_structure_code = 'JEG Timesheet Approvers'
  and pac.segment1 = apr1.person_id (+)
  and pac.segment2 = apr2.person_id (+)
group by ppf.person_id)Pa
,(select ppa.person_id
     , pac.segment4 as Technologist_Solution_Area
     , pac.segment3 as TS_Currently_in_Program
     , pac.enabled_flag as TS_enabled_flag
     , ppa.date_from as TS_START_DATE
     , ppa.date_to as TS_END_DATE
	 ,ppa.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS TS_PPA_LAST_UPDATE_DATE
     ,pac.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS TS_PAC_LAST_UPDATE_DATE
from  PER_PERSON_ANALYSES ppa
    , PER_ANALYSIS_CRITERIA pac
    , apps.fnd_id_flex_structures_tl fifs 
where 1=1
and   ppa.analysis_criteria_id = pac.analysis_criteria_id
and   ppa.ID_FLEX_NUM = fifs.ID_FLEX_NUM
and   fifs.id_flex_structure_name = 'Technologist Solutions'
and   fifs.language = 'US'
and   trunc(sysdate) between nvl(ppa.date_from, trunc(sysdate))  and nvl(ppa.date_to, trunc(sysdate)))TS
  ,per_all_people_f p
     , per_person_type_usages_f pptu
     , per_person_types ppt
     , po_agents buy
     , per_periods_of_service svc
     , fnd_lookup_values lrlkp
     , per_all_vacancies pav
     , (SELECT   res.source_id AS person_id
               , MAX (sr.last_update_date) aux1_changed_on_dt
            FROM ra_salesreps_all sr
               , jtf_rs_resource_extns res
           WHERE sr.resource_id = res.resource_id
                 AND res.CATEGORY = 'EMPLOYEE'
        GROUP BY res.source_id) sr
     , (SELECT a.person_id
             , a.employee_category
             , a.assignment_id
             , a.effective_start_date
             , a.effective_end_date
             , a.position_id
             , a.supervisor_id
             , a.business_group_id
             , a.organization_id
             , a.location_id
             , a.period_of_service_id
             , a.assignment_status_type_id
             , a.assignment_type
             , a.creation_date
             , a.last_update_date
             , a.manager_flag  -- Newly Included
             , RANK () OVER (PARTITION BY assignment_id ORDER BY DECODE
                                                           (a.assignment_type
                                                          , 'E', 1
                                                          , 'C', 2
                                                          , 3
                                                           )
              , a.primary_flag DESC
              , a.effective_start_date DESC
              , a.assignment_id DESC) cnt
              , a.people_group_id 
              , a.vacancy_id
              , a.ASS_ATTRIBUTE2
          FROM per_all_assignments_f a
             , per_assignment_status_types t
         WHERE a.assignment_type IN ('E', 'C', 'A')
           AND a.primary_flag = 'Y'
           AND a.assignment_status_type_id = t.assignment_status_type_id
       ) a
     , (SELECT lookup_code
             , meaning
          FROM hr_standard_lookups
         WHERE lookup_type = 'NATIONALITY') l
     , (SELECT lookup_code
             , meaning
          FROM hr_standard_lookups
         WHERE lookup_type = 'EMPLOYEE_CATG') lc

    ,  (SELECT meaning,pp.parent_id,pp.phone_number
          FROM fnd_lookup_values,per_phones pp
         WHERE lookup_type(+) = 'PHONE_TYPE'
          AND lookup_code(+) = pp.phone_type
           AND language = userenv ('lang')
           AND enabled_flag = 'Y'
        ) pt --Added newly changed by RAR
    ,  (select person_id, MAX(date_from) aux3_changed_on_dt, MAX(last_update_date) last_update_date
          from per_addresses
        WHERE person_id is not  null
        group by person_id) py
,        (select person_id, MAX(last_update_date) aux4_changed_on_dt
          from PER_PEOPLE_EXTRA_INFO
        WHERE person_id is not  null
                  AND INFORMATION_TYPE IN  ('JEG_HR_DIVESTITURE_NEW','JEG_HR_SYSTEM_ID','US_ETHNIC_ORIGIN','JEG_HR_EXTERNAL_SUPERVISOR'  ) 
        group by person_id) ppei,
(SELECT ppei.person_id, PEI_information4
FROM per_people_extra_info ppei , 
(select person_id, max(object_version_number) object_version_number
FROM per_people_extra_info 
WHERE information_type IN 'JEG_HR_SYSTEM_ID'
and pei_information4 is not null
group by person_id) upnmax
WHERE information_type IN 'JEG_HR_SYSTEM_ID'
and pei_information4 is not null
and ppei.person_id=upnmax.person_id and ppei.object_version_number=upnmax.object_version_number) upn,
( SELECT person_id,PEI_INFORMATION3 
FROM per_people_extra_info
WHERE information_type IN 'JEG_HR_SYSTEM_ID' ) TALEO
,(SELECT   papf.person_id
      , ppei.PEI_INFORMATION3 as EXT_SUP_EMP_NUM
      , ppei.PEI_INFORMATION4 as EXT_SUP_EMP_NAME
      , ppei.PEI_INFORMATION10 as EXT_SUP_TERM_DT
      , ppei.PEI_INFORMATION6 as EXT_SUP_EMAIL
      ,Case 
        WHEN SUBSTR(ppei.PEI_INFORMATION3, 1, 2) = 'CH' Then 'Legacy CH2M Oracle HR'
        WHEN SUBSTR(ppei.PEI_INFORMATION3, 1, 2) = 'AT' Then 'ATEN PeopleSoft'
        WHEN SUBSTR(ppei.PEI_INFORMATION3, 1, 2) = 'JE' Then 'Jacobs Oracle HR'
        Else Null 
        END as EXT_SUP_SOURCE_SYSTEM
FROM    PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F papf
        LEFT OUTER JOIN HR.PER_PEOPLE_EXTRA_INFO ppei ON 
                        papf.PERSON_ID = ppei.PERSON_ID 
                    AND ppei.INFORMATION_TYPE LIKE 'JEG_HR_EXTERNAL_SUPERVISOR%'
WHERE 1=1
AND   TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN papf.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AND papf.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE) EXT        
,PAY_PEOPLE_GROUPS PPG
,(SELECT
    pma.person_id AS person_id,
    ppf.full_name AS full_name,
    pma.CONSULTATION_TYPE  AS CONSULTATION_TYPE ,
    hl1.meaning AS CONSULTATION_TYPE_DESC,
    pma.CONSULTATION_DATE AS CONSULTATION_DATE,
    pma.attribute1 AS EYE_CARE,
    pma.CONSULTATION_RESULT  AS CONSULTATION_RESULT,
    hl2.meaning AS CONSULTATION_RESULT_DESC,
    pma.NEXT_CONSULTATION_DATE AS NEXT_CONSULTATION_DATE,
	pma.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE
FROM
    per_medical_assessments pma,
    per_all_people_f ppf,
    FND_COMMON_lookups hl1,
    FND_COMMON_lookups hl2
WHERE
    pma.person_id = ppf.person_id
    AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN ppf.effective_start_date AND ppf.effective_end_date
    AND pma.CONSULTATION_TYPE ='PLPMA'
    AND pma.CONSULTATION_TYPE = hl1.lookup_code(+)
    AND hl1.lookup_type(+) = 'CONSULTATION_TYPE' 
    AND pma.CONSULTATION_RESULT = hl2.lookup_code(+)
    AND hl2.lookup_type(+) = 'CONSULTATION_RESULT'
    and pma.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY='PL Assessment Details' ) EN
,( select next_consultation_date
,  PERSON_ID, pma.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE
,  attribute4 as Tropical_Work_Eligibility                                   -- new data item
,  (SELECT meaning
    FROM apps.fnd_lookup_values
    where lookup_type = 'JEG_PL_TROPICAL_ELIG_COUNTRY'
    and   language = 'US'
    and   lookup_code = pma.attribute5) as Tropical_Eligible_Country         -- new data item
from PER_MEDICAL_ASSESSMENTS pma
where attribute_category = 'PL Assessment Details'
and attribute5 is not null and attribute4 is not null ) TE

WHERE (   p.creation_date >=
                      TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss')
        OR p.last_update_date >=
                    TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss')
        OR svc.last_update_date >=
                      TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss')
        OR sr.aux1_changed_on_dt >=
                      TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss')
        OR buy.creation_date >=
                      TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss')
        OR buy.last_update_date >=
                      TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss')
        OR a.creation_date >=
                      TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss')
        OR a.last_update_date >=
                      TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss')
        OR py.aux3_changed_on_dt >= 
                      TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss')
        OR py.last_update_date >= 
                       TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss')
        OR ppei.aux4_changed_on_dt >= 
                      TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss')
		OR pptu.last_update_date >= 
					  TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss')	
		OR TS.TS_PPA_LAST_UPDATE_DATE	>=  
						TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss')	
		OR TS.TS_PAC_LAST_UPDATE_DATE >=
		TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss')
		OR EN.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >=
		TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss')
			OR TE.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >=
		TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss')
		
       ) 
and p.business_group_id NOT IN (SELECT /*+ USE_HASH( ffvs PPTU) */  hou.organization_id
FROM apps.fnd_flex_value_sets ffvs ,
     apps.fnd_flex_values ffv ,
     apps.fnd_flex_values_tl ffvt,
     apps.HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS hou
WHERE ffvs.flex_value_set_id   = ffv.flex_value_set_id
  AND ffv.flex_value_id        = ffvt.flex_value_id
  AND ffvt.language            = 'US'
  AND ffvs.flex_value_set_name = 'JEG_HR_INTERFACE_BG_EXCLUSION_LIST'
  AND ffv.flex_value           = hou.name)
  AND pptu.person_id = p.person_id
   AND p.effective_end_date BETWEEN pptu.effective_start_date
                                AND pptu.effective_end_date
   AND ppt.person_type_id = pptu.person_type_id
   AND ppt.user_person_type NOT IN
          ('Foreign National'
         , 'Ex-Foreign National'
          )
   AND ppt.system_person_type IN ('EMP','EMP_APL','EX_EMP','EX_EMP_APL')     
    AND ((ppt.user_person_type LIKE 'Employee%' OR ppt.user_person_type LIKE 'Expatriate%' 
    OR  ppt.user_person_type LIKE 'Job Shopper%')    
    OR (ppt.user_person_type LIKE 'Ex-employee%' OR ppt.user_person_type LIKE 'Ex-Expatriate%' 
    OR  ppt.user_person_type LIKE 'Ex-Job Shopper%'))          
   AND p.person_id = buy.agent_id(+)
   AND p.person_id = svc.person_id(+)
   AND p.effective_start_date BETWEEN svc.date_start(+) AND CASE WHEN (p.current_employee_flag = 'Y' OR p.current_npw_flag = 'Y') THEN NVL(svc.actual_termination_date(+), p.effective_start_date)ELSE NVL
                                                               (1 + svc.actual_termination_date(+)
                                                             , p.effective_start_date
                                                              ) END
   AND lrlkp.lookup_type(+) = 'LEAV_REAS'
   AND lrlkp.LANGUAGE(+) = 'US'
   AND lrlkp.lookup_code(+) = svc.leaving_reason
   AND p.person_id = sr.person_id(+)
   AND p.person_id = a.person_id (+)
   AND p.effective_end_date BETWEEN a.effective_start_date (+)
                                  AND a.effective_end_date (+)
   AND p.nationality = l.lookup_code(+)
   AND a.employee_category = lc.lookup_code(+)
   AND p.person_id = pt.parent_id(+) -- changed from ppto pt
   and p.person_id = pa.person_id(+) -- changed pp to pt
   AND p.person_id = TS.person_id(+) 
   and p.person_id = py.person_id(+)
   and p.person_id = ppei.person_id(+)
   and p.person_id  = upn.person_id(+)
   and p.person_id  = EXT.person_id(+)
   and p.person_id	= TALEO.person_id(+)
AND a.people_group_id = ppg.people_group_id(+)
AND P.person_id = EN.person_id(+)
AND P.person_id = TE.person_id(+)
and pav.vacancy_id (+) = a.vacancy_id
attributes.Lookup Sql Override:
SELECT PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AS EFFECTIVE_START_DATE,
  PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE        AS EFFECTIVE_END_DATE,
  PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.LOCATION_ID               AS LOCATION_ID,
  PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.PRIMARY_FLAG              AS PRIMARY_FLAG,
  PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.APPLICATION_ID            AS APPLICATION_ID,
  PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.ASSIGNMENT_NUMBER         AS ASSIGNMENT_NUMBER,
  PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.SOURCE_TYPE               AS SOURCE_TYPE,
   DECODE(HL.style,'ES',APPS.hr_general.decode_lookup@EPROD('HR_ES_LOCATION_TYPES',HL.address_line_1),
       'PL',APPS.hr_general.decode_lookup@EPROD('PL_STREET_TYPE', HL.address_line_1),HL.address_line_1)  AS WORK_ST_ADDRESS,
 DECODE(HL.style,'AE_JEG',apps.hr_general.decode_lookup@EPROD('AE_CITY_CODES', HL.town_or_city)
                        ,'CN_GLB',apps.hr_general.decode_lookup@EPROD('CN_PROVINCE', HL.town_or_city)
                                                ,'SA',apps.hr_general.decode_lookup@EPROD('SA_CITY', HL.town_or_city),HL.town_or_city)  AS WORK_CITY,

  HL.REGION_2   AS WORK_STATE_CODE,
  HL.REGION_1 AS WORK_STATE_REGION,
  HL.COUNTRY        AS WORK_COUNTRY_CODE,
  HL.postal_code            AS WORK_ZIPCODE,
  PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.PERSON_ID             AS PERSON_ID
FROM PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F@EPROD  PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F
, HR_LOCATIONS@EPROD HL
WHERE PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.LOCATION_ID = HL.LOCATION_ID
AND (SELECT MAX(LOAD_DT) FROM W_ETL_RUN_S) BETWEEN EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AND EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
ORDER BY PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE DESC
--
--AND PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.PRIMARY_FLAG <>'N'

sql_overrides.sql_query:
SELECT /*+ PARALLEL(4) */ DISTINCT 
       p.person_id
     , p.first_name
     , p.middle_names
     , p.last_name
     , p.previous_last_name
     , p.full_name
     , p.pre_name_adjunct
     , p.suffix
     , p.title
     , p.date_of_birth
     , p.country_of_birth
     , p.sex
     , p.email_address
     , NVL (svc.date_start, p.start_date) emp_hire_dt
     , p.original_date_of_hire orig_hire_dt
     , svc.adjusted_svc_date adj_service_dt
     , svc.accepted_termination_date accepted_termination_dt
     , svc.actual_termination_date actual_termination_dt
     , lrlkp.meaning leaving_reason
     , p.employee_number
     , p.applicant_number
     , p.npw_number
     , p.marital_status
     , p.national_identifier
     , CASE p.per_information_category
          WHEN 'CN'
             THEN p.per_information17
          WHEN 'GB'
             THEN p.per_information1
          WHEN 'IE'
             THEN p.per_information2
          WHEN 'NZ'
             THEN p.per_information4
          WHEN 'SG'
             THEN p.per_information18
          WHEN 'ZA'
             THEN p.per_information5
          ELSE NULL
       END ethnic_grp_code
     , CASE p.per_information_category
          WHEN 'US'
             THEN p.per_information4
          WHEN 'SG'
             THEN p.per_information8
          ELSE NULL
       END wrk_perm_type_code
     , p.correspondence_language
     , CASE p.per_information_category
          WHEN 'US'
             THEN p.per_information25
          ELSE NULL
       END veteran_status_code
     , p.registered_disabled_flag
     , CASE p.per_information_category
          WHEN 'AE'
             THEN p.per_information10
          WHEN 'KW'
             THEN p.per_information8
          WHEN 'SA'
             THEN p.per_information7
          WHEN 'ZG'
             THEN p.per_information16
          WHEN 'ZA'
             THEN p.per_information7
          ELSE NULL
       END w_religion_code
     , (CASE
           WHEN (p.current_employee_flag = 'Y' OR p.current_npw_flag = 'Y')
              THEN 'Y'
           ELSE 'N'
        END
       ) current_worker_flg
     , (CASE
           WHEN sr.person_id IS NULL
              THEN 'N'
           ELSE 'Y'
        END) sales_rep_flg
     , (CASE
           WHEN buy.agent_id IS NULL
              THEN 'N'
           ELSE 'Y'
        END) buyer_flg
     , (CASE
           WHEN p.current_employee_flag IS NULL
              THEN 'N'
           ELSE 'Y'
        END) requestor_flg
     , (CASE
           WHEN p.current_applicant_flag IS NULL
              THEN 'N'
           ELSE 'Y'
        END) applicant_flg
     , p.created_by
     , p.last_updated_by
     , p.creation_date
     , p.last_update_date
     , sr.aux1_changed_on_dt
     , buy.last_update_date aux2_changed_on_dt
     , p.effective_start_date
     , p.effective_end_date
     , l.meaning nationality
     , a.position_id position_id
     , a.business_group_id
     , a.location_id
     , a.organization_id
     , a.supervisor_id
     , a.manager_flag  -- Newly Included
     , '0' AS x_custom
     , lc.meaning employee_category
     , lc.meaning transaction_code
     , p.attribute_category
     , p.attribute1
     , p.attribute2
     , p.attribute3
     , p.attribute4
     , p.attribute5
     , p.attribute6
     , p.attribute7
     , p.attribute8
     , (SELECT ppf9.full_name
          FROM per_all_people_f ppf9
         WHERE ppf9.person_id = p.attribute9
           AND TRUNC (SYSDATE) BETWEEN ppf9.effective_start_date
                                   AND ppf9.effective_end_date) attribute9
     , p.attribute10
     , nvl(pav.name, a.vacancy_id)  as attribute11
     , p.attribute12
     , p.attribute13
     , p.attribute14
     , DECODE (p.attribute_category
             , 'CL Additional Personal Details', DECODE (p.attribute15
                                                       , 'Y', 'Yes'
                                                       , 'N', 'No'
                                                        )
             , 'IN Additional Personal Details', (SELECT meaning
                                                    FROM fnd_lookup_values
                                                   WHERE lookup_code =
                                                                 p.attribute15
                                                     AND enabled_flag = 'Y'
                                                     AND lookup_type =
                                                                 'IN_RELIGION'
                                                     AND LANGUAGE =
                                                              USERENV ('lang'))
             , 'PE Additional Personal Details', DECODE (p.attribute15
                                                       , 'Y', 'Yes'
                                                       , 'N', 'No'
                                                        )
             , 'SG Additional Personal Details', (SELECT meaning
                                                    FROM fnd_lookup_values
                                                   WHERE lookup_code =
                                                                 p.attribute15
                                                     AND enabled_flag = 'Y'
                                                     AND lookup_type =
                                                                     'SG_RACE'
                                                     AND LANGUAGE =
                                                              USERENV ('lang'))
             , 'US Employee', DECODE (p.attribute15, 'Y', 'Yes', 'N', 'No')
             , 'US Expatriate Employee', DECODE (p.attribute15
                                               , 'Y', 'Yes'
                                               , 'N', 'No'
                                                )
             , p.attribute15
              ) attribute15
     , DECODE (p.attribute_category
             , 'FR Additional Personal Details', DECODE (p.attribute16
                                                       , 'Y', 'Yes'
                                                       , 'N', 'No'
                                                        )
             , 'IT Additional Personal Details', (SELECT meaning
                                                    FROM fnd_lookup_values
                                                   WHERE lookup_code =
                                                                 p.attribute16
                                                     AND enabled_flag = 'Y'
                                                     AND lookup_type =
                                                                 'IT_PROVINCE'
                                                     AND LANGUAGE =
                                                              USERENV ('lang'))
             , 'PE Additional Personal Details', (SELECT meaning
                                                    FROM fnd_lookup_values
                                                   WHERE lookup_code =
                                                                 p.attribute16
                                                     AND enabled_flag = 'Y'
                                                     AND lookup_type =
                                                            'JEG_HR_PE_NI_TYPE'
                                                     AND LANGUAGE =
                                                              USERENV ('lang'))
             , 'SG Additional Personal Details', (SELECT meaning
                                                    FROM fnd_lookup_values
                                                   WHERE lookup_code =
                                                                 p.attribute16
                                                     AND enabled_flag = 'Y'
                                                     AND lookup_type =
                                                            'JEG_SG_CITIZEN_STATUS'
                                                     AND LANGUAGE =
                                                              USERENV ('lang'))
             , 'US Employee', DECODE (p.attribute16, 'Y', 'Yes', 'N', 'No')
             , 'US Expatriate Employee', DECODE (p.attribute16
                                               , 'Y', 'Yes'
                                               , 'N', 'No'
                                                )
             , p.attribute16
              ) attribute16
     , DECODE (p.attribute_category
             , 'ES Additional Personal Details', (SELECT meaning
                                                    FROM fnd_lookup_values
                                                   WHERE lookup_code =
                                                                 p.attribute17
                                                     AND enabled_flag = 'Y'
                                                     AND lookup_type =
                                                              'JEG_HR_ES_CNAE'
                                                     AND LANGUAGE =
                                                              USERENV ('lang'))
             , p.attribute17
              ) attribute17
     , DECODE (p.attribute_category
             , 'BE Additional Personal Details', (SELECT meaning
                                                    FROM fnd_lookup_values
                                                   WHERE lookup_code =
                                                                 p.attribute18
                                                     AND enabled_flag = 'Y'
                                                     AND lookup_type =
                                                             'JEG_BE_CORRESPONDENCE_LANGUAGE'
                                                     AND LANGUAGE =
                                                              USERENV ('lang'))
             , 'FR Additional Personal Details', DECODE (p.attribute18
                                                       , 'Y', 'Yes'
                                                       , 'N', 'No'
                                                        )
             , 'GB Additional Person Details', (SELECT meaning
                                                  FROM fnd_lookup_values
                                                 WHERE lookup_code =
                                                                 p.attribute18
                                                   AND enabled_flag = 'Y'
                                                   AND lookup_type =
                                                           'JEG_HR_GB_ACQUISITION_COMPANY'
                                                   AND LANGUAGE =
                                                              USERENV ('lang'))
             , 'IE Additional Person Details', (SELECT meaning
                                                  FROM fnd_lookup_values
                                                 WHERE lookup_code =
                                                                 p.attribute18
                                                   AND enabled_flag = 'Y'
                                                   AND lookup_type =
                                                           'JEG_HR_IE_ACQUISITION_COMPANY'
                                                   AND LANGUAGE =
                                                              USERENV ('lang'))
             , p.attribute18
              ) attribute18
     , DECODE (p.attribute_category
             , 'GB Additional Personal Details', DECODE (p.attribute19
                                                       , 'Y', 'Yes'
                                                       , 'N', 'No'
                                                        )
             , 'IE Additional Person Details', DECODE (p.attribute19
                                                     , 'Y', 'Yes'
                                                     , 'N', 'No'
                                                      )
             , p.attribute19
              ) attribute19
     , DECODE (p.attribute_category
             , 'US Employee', DECODE (p.attribute20, 'Y', 'Yes', 'N', 'No')
             , 'US Expatriate Employee', DECODE (p.attribute20
                                               , 'Y', 'Yes'
                                               , 'N', 'No'
                                                )
             , p.attribute20
              ) attribute20
     , DECODE (p.attribute_category
             , 'CZ Additional Personal Details', DECODE (p.attribute21
                                                       , 'Y', 'Yes'
                                                       , 'N', 'No'
                                                        )
             , 'GB Additional Person Details', DECODE (p.attribute21
                                                     , 'Y', 'Yes'
                                                     , 'N', 'No'
                                                      )
             , p.attribute21
              ) attribute21
     , p.attribute22
     , p.attribute23
     , p.attribute24
     , p.attribute25
     , p.attribute26
     , p.attribute27
     , p.attribute28
     , p.attribute29
     , p.attribute30
,p.KNOWN_AS
,p.MAILSTOP
,p.ON_MILITARY_SERVICE
,p.SECOND_PASSPORT_EXISTS
,p.DPDNT_VLNTRY_SVCE_FLAG   
,p.TOWN_OF_BIRTH --Column Order Changed
,p.REGION_OF_BIRTH --Column Order Changed
,p.per_information2
,p.per_information7
,p.per_information8
,p.per_information9
,p.DATE_OF_DEATH
,pa.secondary_approver
,pt.Phone_number  -- changed pp to pt by rar
,((sysdate- p.date_of_birth)/365) Age --  Age Rounded Issue
,pa.primary_approver
,p.BENEFIT_GROUP_ID
,p.USES_TOBACCO_FLAG
,p.COORD_BEN_NO_CVG_FLAG
,p.RECEIPT_OF_DEATH_CERT_DATE
,p.COORD_BEN_MED_PLN_NO
,p.WORK_SCHEDULE
,p.FTE_CAPACITY
,p.DATE_EMPLOYEE_DATA_VERIFIED
,p.STUDENT_STATUS
,p.DPDNT_ADOPTION_DATE
,pt.meaning PHONE_TYPE --Added newly - changed it top meaning from lookup_code
,PPG.SEGMENT6 REG_TEMP_OTHER
,CASE p.per_information_category
          WHEN 'NL'
                     THEN p.per_information1
          ELSE NULL
    END AS X_INITIALS  
,CASE p.per_information_category
    WHEN 'US'
    THEN p.per_information25
    ELSE NULL
  END AS VETS100A_CODE,
   CASE WHEN p.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = 0 
THEN
p.PER_INFORMATION29
ELSE
p.REGISTERED_DISABLED_FLAG END as DISABILITY_CODE
,DECODE (p.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID , 0,
  (SELECT distinct meaning
FROM fnd_lookup_values 
WHERE  
 lookup_code  = p.PER_INFORMATION29
AND lookup_type =  'US_OFCCP_DIASABILITY' 
AND language = 'US') , 
  (SELECT distinct meaning
FROM   fnd_lookup_values 
WHERE  
lookup_code  = p.REGISTERED_DISABLED_FLAG
AND lookup_type =  'REGISTERED_DISABLED' 
AND language = 'US')) DISABILITY_NAME
,upn.PEI_information4 ACTIVE_DIRECTORY_UPN
,TALEO.PEI_INFORMATION3 X_TALEO_CAND_ID
,'' AS EXT_SUP_EMP_NUM
,'' AS EXT_SUP_EMP_NAME
,'' AS EXT_SUP_TERM_DT
,'' AS EXT_SUP_EMAIL
,'' AS EXT_SUP_SOURCE_SYSTEM
,a.ASS_ATTRIBUTE2 DEPARTMENT_CODE
, CASE p.per_information_category
          WHEN 'IN'
             THEN p.per_information4
       END AS X_IN_PAN_NUM
,ppt.SYSTEM_PERSON_TYPE
,p.OFFICE_NUMBER
,TS.Technologist_Solution_Area
,TS.TS_Currently_in_Program
,TS.TS_enabled_flag
,TS.TS_START_DATE
,TS.TS_END_DATE
,CASE p.per_information_category WHEN 'IN' THEN p.PER_INFORMATION16 ELSE NULL END AS x_aadhaar_num
,(select meaning
               from apps.fnd_lookup_values a
               where lookup_type = 'JEG_HR_DETAILED_LEAV_REAS'
               and LANGUAGE = 'US'
               and a.lookup_code = svc.pds_information16
              ) as Detailed_leaving_reason  
,svc.NOTIFIED_TERMINATION_DATE ,
p.party_id,
(SELECT description
		FROM apps.fnd_lookup_values flv
		WHERE lookup_type = 'JEG_HR_ELT_SLT_FLAG'
		AND   language = 'US'
		AND   p.ATTRIBUTE11 = flv.lookup_code) ELT_SLT_FLAG --Added newly as part of SCTASK0886709
, EN.CONSULTATION_DATE
,EN.NEXT_CONSULTATION_DATE
,EN.EYE_CARE		
,TE.Tropical_Work_Eligibility
,TE.Tropical_Eligible_Country

  FROM 
  (select ppf.person_id
      ,max(decode(fif.application_column_name,'SEGMENT1',apr1.full_name,''))  Primary_Approver
      ,max(decode(fif.application_column_name,'SEGMENT2',apr2.full_name,''))  Secondary_Approver
        from 
            apps.per_people_x ppf
    ,apps.per_people_x apr1
    ,apps.per_people_x apr2
    ,apps.per_person_analyses ppa
    ,apps.per_analysis_criteria pac
    ,apps.fnd_id_flex_segments fif
    ,apps.fnd_id_flex_structures ffs
where 1=1
  and ppf.person_id = ppa.person_id
  and ppa.analysis_criteria_id = pac.analysis_criteria_id
  and pac.id_flex_num = fif.id_flex_num
  and pac.id_flex_num = ffs.id_flex_num
  and ffs.id_flex_structure_code = 'JEG Timesheet Approvers'
  and pac.segment1 = apr1.person_id (+)
  and pac.segment2 = apr2.person_id (+)
group by ppf.person_id)Pa
,(select ppa.person_id
     , pac.segment4 as Technologist_Solution_Area
     , pac.segment3 as TS_Currently_in_Program
     , pac.enabled_flag as TS_enabled_flag
     , ppa.date_from as TS_START_DATE
     , ppa.date_to as TS_END_DATE
	 ,ppa.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS TS_PPA_LAST_UPDATE_DATE
     ,pac.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS TS_PAC_LAST_UPDATE_DATE
from  PER_PERSON_ANALYSES ppa
    , PER_ANALYSIS_CRITERIA pac
    , apps.fnd_id_flex_structures_tl fifs 
where 1=1
and   ppa.analysis_criteria_id = pac.analysis_criteria_id
and   ppa.ID_FLEX_NUM = fifs.ID_FLEX_NUM
and   fifs.id_flex_structure_name = 'Technologist Solutions'
and   fifs.language = 'US'
and   trunc(sysdate) between nvl(ppa.date_from, trunc(sysdate))  and nvl(ppa.date_to, trunc(sysdate)))TS
  ,per_all_people_f p
     , per_person_type_usages_f pptu
     , per_person_types ppt
     , po_agents buy
     , per_periods_of_service svc
     , fnd_lookup_values lrlkp
     , per_all_vacancies pav
     , (SELECT   res.source_id AS person_id
               , MAX (sr.last_update_date) aux1_changed_on_dt
            FROM ra_salesreps_all sr
               , jtf_rs_resource_extns res
           WHERE sr.resource_id = res.resource_id
                 AND res.CATEGORY = 'EMPLOYEE'
        GROUP BY res.source_id) sr
     , (SELECT a.person_id
             , a.employee_category
             , a.assignment_id
             , a.effective_start_date
             , a.effective_end_date
             , a.position_id
             , a.supervisor_id
             , a.business_group_id
             , a.organization_id
             , a.location_id
             , a.period_of_service_id
             , a.assignment_status_type_id
             , a.assignment_type
             , a.creation_date
             , a.last_update_date
             , a.manager_flag  -- Newly Included
             , RANK () OVER (PARTITION BY assignment_id ORDER BY DECODE
                                                           (a.assignment_type
                                                          , 'E', 1
                                                          , 'C', 2
                                                          , 3
                                                           )
              , a.primary_flag DESC
              , a.effective_start_date DESC
              , a.assignment_id DESC) cnt
              , a.people_group_id 
              , a.vacancy_id
              , a.ASS_ATTRIBUTE2
          FROM per_all_assignments_f a
             , per_assignment_status_types t
         WHERE a.assignment_type IN ('E', 'C', 'A')
           AND a.primary_flag = 'Y'
           AND a.assignment_status_type_id = t.assignment_status_type_id
       ) a
     , (SELECT lookup_code
             , meaning
          FROM hr_standard_lookups
         WHERE lookup_type = 'NATIONALITY') l
     , (SELECT lookup_code
             , meaning
          FROM hr_standard_lookups
         WHERE lookup_type = 'EMPLOYEE_CATG') lc

    ,  (SELECT meaning,pp.parent_id,pp.phone_number
          FROM fnd_lookup_values,per_phones pp
         WHERE lookup_type(+) = 'PHONE_TYPE'
          AND lookup_code(+) = pp.phone_type
           AND language = userenv ('lang')
           AND enabled_flag = 'Y'
        ) pt --Added newly changed by RAR
    ,  (select person_id, MAX(date_from) aux3_changed_on_dt, MAX(last_update_date) last_update_date
          from per_addresses
        WHERE person_id is not  null
        group by person_id) py
,        (select person_id, MAX(last_update_date) aux4_changed_on_dt
          from PER_PEOPLE_EXTRA_INFO
        WHERE person_id is not  null
                  AND INFORMATION_TYPE IN  ('JEG_HR_DIVESTITURE_NEW','JEG_HR_SYSTEM_ID','US_ETHNIC_ORIGIN','JEG_HR_EXTERNAL_SUPERVISOR'  ) 
        group by person_id) ppei,
(SELECT ppei.person_id, PEI_information4
FROM per_people_extra_info ppei , 
(select person_id, max(object_version_number) object_version_number
FROM per_people_extra_info 
WHERE information_type IN 'JEG_HR_SYSTEM_ID'
and pei_information4 is not null
group by person_id) upnmax
WHERE information_type IN 'JEG_HR_SYSTEM_ID'
and pei_information4 is not null
and ppei.person_id=upnmax.person_id and ppei.object_version_number=upnmax.object_version_number) upn,
( SELECT person_id,PEI_INFORMATION3 
FROM per_people_extra_info
WHERE information_type IN 'JEG_HR_SYSTEM_ID' ) TALEO
,(SELECT   papf.person_id
      , ppei.PEI_INFORMATION3 as EXT_SUP_EMP_NUM
      , ppei.PEI_INFORMATION4 as EXT_SUP_EMP_NAME
      , ppei.PEI_INFORMATION10 as EXT_SUP_TERM_DT
      , ppei.PEI_INFORMATION6 as EXT_SUP_EMAIL
      ,Case 
        WHEN SUBSTR(ppei.PEI_INFORMATION3, 1, 2) = 'CH' Then 'Legacy CH2M Oracle HR'
        WHEN SUBSTR(ppei.PEI_INFORMATION3, 1, 2) = 'AT' Then 'ATEN PeopleSoft'
        WHEN SUBSTR(ppei.PEI_INFORMATION3, 1, 2) = 'JE' Then 'Jacobs Oracle HR'
        Else Null 
        END as EXT_SUP_SOURCE_SYSTEM
FROM    PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F papf
        LEFT OUTER JOIN HR.PER_PEOPLE_EXTRA_INFO ppei ON 
                        papf.PERSON_ID = ppei.PERSON_ID 
                    AND ppei.INFORMATION_TYPE LIKE 'JEG_HR_EXTERNAL_SUPERVISOR%'
WHERE 1=1
AND   TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN papf.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AND papf.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE) EXT        
,PAY_PEOPLE_GROUPS PPG
,(SELECT
    pma.person_id AS person_id,
    ppf.full_name AS full_name,
    pma.CONSULTATION_TYPE  AS CONSULTATION_TYPE ,
    hl1.meaning AS CONSULTATION_TYPE_DESC,
    pma.CONSULTATION_DATE AS CONSULTATION_DATE,
    pma.attribute1 AS EYE_CARE,
    pma.CONSULTATION_RESULT  AS CONSULTATION_RESULT,
    hl2.meaning AS CONSULTATION_RESULT_DESC,
    pma.NEXT_CONSULTATION_DATE AS NEXT_CONSULTATION_DATE,
	pma.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE
FROM
    per_medical_assessments pma,
    per_all_people_f ppf,
    FND_COMMON_lookups hl1,
    FND_COMMON_lookups hl2
WHERE
    pma.person_id = ppf.person_id
    AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN ppf.effective_start_date AND ppf.effective_end_date
    AND pma.CONSULTATION_TYPE ='PLPMA'
    AND pma.CONSULTATION_TYPE = hl1.lookup_code(+)
    AND hl1.lookup_type(+) = 'CONSULTATION_TYPE' 
    AND pma.CONSULTATION_RESULT = hl2.lookup_code(+)
    AND hl2.lookup_type(+) = 'CONSULTATION_RESULT'
    and pma.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY='PL Assessment Details' ) EN
,( select next_consultation_date
,  PERSON_ID, pma.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE
,  attribute4 as Tropical_Work_Eligibility                                   -- new data item
,  (SELECT meaning
    FROM apps.fnd_lookup_values
    where lookup_type = 'JEG_PL_TROPICAL_ELIG_COUNTRY'
    and   language = 'US'
    and   lookup_code = pma.attribute5) as Tropical_Eligible_Country         -- new data item
from PER_MEDICAL_ASSESSMENTS pma
where attribute_category = 'PL Assessment Details'
and attribute5 is not null and attribute4 is not null ) TE

WHERE (   p.creation_date >=
                      TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss')
        OR p.last_update_date >=
                    TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss')
        OR svc.last_update_date >=
                      TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss')
        OR sr.aux1_changed_on_dt >=
                      TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss')
        OR buy.creation_date >=
                      TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss')
        OR buy.last_update_date >=
                      TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss')
        OR a.creation_date >=
                      TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss')
        OR a.last_update_date >=
                      TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss')
        OR py.aux3_changed_on_dt >= 
                      TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss')
        OR py.last_update_date >= 
                       TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss')
        OR ppei.aux4_changed_on_dt >= 
                      TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss')
		OR pptu.last_update_date >= 
					  TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss')	
		OR TS.TS_PPA_LAST_UPDATE_DATE	>=  
						TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss')	
		OR TS.TS_PAC_LAST_UPDATE_DATE >=
		TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss')
		OR EN.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >=
		TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss')
			OR TE.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >=
		TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss')
		
       ) 
and p.business_group_id NOT IN (SELECT /*+ USE_HASH( ffvs PPTU) */  hou.organization_id
FROM apps.fnd_flex_value_sets ffvs ,
     apps.fnd_flex_values ffv ,
     apps.fnd_flex_values_tl ffvt,
     apps.HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS hou
WHERE ffvs.flex_value_set_id   = ffv.flex_value_set_id
  AND ffv.flex_value_id        = ffvt.flex_value_id
  AND ffvt.language            = 'US'
  AND ffvs.flex_value_set_name = 'JEG_HR_INTERFACE_BG_EXCLUSION_LIST'
  AND ffv.flex_value           = hou.name)
  AND pptu.person_id = p.person_id
   AND p.effective_end_date BETWEEN pptu.effective_start_date
                                AND pptu.effective_end_date
   AND ppt.person_type_id = pptu.person_type_id
   AND ppt.user_person_type NOT IN
          ('Foreign National'
         , 'Ex-Foreign National'
          )
   AND ppt.system_person_type IN ('EMP','EMP_APL','EX_EMP','EX_EMP_APL')     
    AND ((ppt.user_person_type LIKE 'Employee%' OR ppt.user_person_type LIKE 'Expatriate%' 
    OR  ppt.user_person_type LIKE 'Job Shopper%')    
    OR (ppt.user_person_type LIKE 'Ex-employee%' OR ppt.user_person_type LIKE 'Ex-Expatriate%' 
    OR  ppt.user_person_type LIKE 'Ex-Job Shopper%'))          
   AND p.person_id = buy.agent_id(+)
   AND p.person_id = svc.person_id(+)
   AND p.effective_start_date BETWEEN svc.date_start(+) AND CASE WHEN (p.current_employee_flag = 'Y' OR p.current_npw_flag = 'Y') THEN NVL(svc.actual_termination_date(+), p.effective_start_date)ELSE NVL
                                                               (1 + svc.actual_termination_date(+)
                                                             , p.effective_start_date
                                                              ) END
   AND lrlkp.lookup_type(+) = 'LEAV_REAS'
   AND lrlkp.LANGUAGE(+) = 'US'
   AND lrlkp.lookup_code(+) = svc.leaving_reason
   AND p.person_id = sr.person_id(+)
   AND p.person_id = a.person_id (+)
   AND p.effective_end_date BETWEEN a.effective_start_date (+)
                                  AND a.effective_end_date (+)
   AND p.nationality = l.lookup_code(+)
   AND a.employee_category = lc.lookup_code(+)
   AND p.person_id = pt.parent_id(+) -- changed from ppto pt
   and p.person_id = pa.person_id(+) -- changed pp to pt
   AND p.person_id = TS.person_id(+) 
   and p.person_id = py.person_id(+)
   and p.person_id = ppei.person_id(+)
   and p.person_id  = upn.person_id(+)
   and p.person_id  = EXT.person_id(+)
   and p.person_id	= TALEO.person_id(+)
AND a.people_group_id = ppg.people_group_id(+)
AND P.person_id = EN.person_id(+)
AND P.person_id = TE.person_id(+)
and pav.vacancy_id (+) = a.vacancy_id
